case_title: RON HETLAND VS. JOE LIMA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HETLAND, RON ON DEFENDANT LIMA, JOE DOES 1-X

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HETLAND, RON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIMA, JOE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 748 DIVISADERO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117 $6,060.10 RENT, $204.24 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,264.34, STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-2004, SEE SCANNED DOC
